task_completion.description: Save the document as a new file named sepsis_protocol_formatted.docx
task_completion.visual_evidence: The window title of the word processor or a file manager window shows the filename 'sepsis_protocol_formatted.docx'.
The Page Style dialog shows 1.00" for all margins, or the horizontal ruler indicates a 6.5-inch text width (from 0 to 6.5) on a standard 8.5x11 page.

task_completion.description: Change body text font to 11pt Liberation Sans or Arial
task_completion.visual_evidence: When body text is selected, the font family dropdown shows 'Liberation Sans' or 'Arial' and the font size dropdown shows '11'.

task_completion.description: Set line spacing to 1.15 and spacing after paragraphs to approximately 6pt
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Paragraph settings dialog shows line spacing set to 1.15 and spacing below paragraph set to ~6pt (or 0.08 inches), or the text visibly displays wider line spacing and distinct gaps between paragraphs.
The title 'Sepsis Management Clinical Protocol' at the beginning of the document is visibly center-aligned.
The header area at the top of the page contains the text 'Memorial Regional Hospital — Clinical Protocol — Effective 2024'.

task_completion.description: Apply Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles to appropriate sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Major sections (e.g., 'Purpose and Scope', 'Definitions') are visibly formatted as Heading 1, and subsections (e.g., 'Fluid Resuscitation') as Heading 2. This can be verified by their visual appearance (larger, bolder text) or the styles dropdown showing 'Heading 1'/'Heading 2' when the cursor is on them.

integrity.description: The agent used a word processor GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show LibreOffice Writer or a similar word processor application open and being interacted with, rather than a terminal running a Python script to manipulate the .docx file.

integrity.description: The original draft document was not overwritten
integrity.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows both 'sepsis_protocol_draft.docx' and 'sepsis_protocol_formatted.docx' existing in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 9 major sections requiring 'Heading 1' style are: Purpose and Scope, Definitions, Screening and Early Identification, Initial Resuscitation, Antimicrobial Therapy, Hemodynamic Management, Organ Support, Monitoring and Reassessment, References. The header must exactly read 'Memorial Regional Hospital — Clinical Protocol — Effective 2024'. The original document had 1.25-inch margins, Liberation Serif 12pt font, and single spacing; verify these have been changed to 1.0-inch, Liberation Sans/Arial 11pt, and 1.15 line spacing with 6pt after paragraphs.
